product_name: Asaya Ceramide Moisturizer for Dark Spots & Pigmentation Removal with MelaMe Complex for Men & Women
ingredients: Key Ingredients:         MelaMe Complex:   It works on existing dark spots by breaking excess melanin deposits down into re-absorbable amino acids. MelaMe further inhibits excess melanin production, thereby fading and preventing blemishes and bringing even-toned, clarified skin. It restores skin more effectively, uniformly, and much faster than other ingredients used to treat hyperpigmentation.   Alpha Arbutin:   Targeting hyperpigmentation by inhibiting the enzyme that causes melasma and discoloration, alpha arbutin supercharges MelaMe action and treats dark spots and scars caused by sun damage, irritants, and breakouts. Its effective interruption also checks future acne and post-inflammatory blemishing.   Ceramides:   Making up over half the composition of skin, ceramides are naturally occurring oils in the skin that make up the lipid barrier. With time, skin - especially melanated skin that experiences accelerated aging - loses its ceramides, making it vulnerable to acne, inflammation, disbalanced and dry skin. It is beneficial for all skin types.     Hyaluronic Acid:  Hyaluronic acid, also known as hyaluronan, is a clear, gooey substance that is naturally produced by our body. By adding hyaluronic acid into your skincare routine, you're alleviating dryness and signs of aging. It works by inhibiting excess melanin formation, and breaking down accumulated melanin patches to diffuse existing hyperpigmentation. It also helps prevent future acne marks and blemishes to yield a clearer, brighter skin tone. Hyaluronic Acid:   Its sponge-like tendency to absorb and retain water ensures long-lasting hydration. Cica:   Especially effective on acne and similar hypertrophic irritations, cica is the buzzword in comprehensive acne skincare because of its remarkable benefits in skin recovery. ingredients: Key Ingredients:        Ceramide:  Ceramides are lipids (fats) that are found naturally in high concentrations in the uppermost layers of skin. They make up over 50% of skin's composition. As we age we tend to produce less ceramides. Also damaged barrier and eczema prone people have less ceramides in their epidermis, hence its beneficial to apply them on skin.     Centella Asiatica:  Centella Asiatica extract, also known as Gotu Kola, is a perennial skin remedy. It has a lot of active compounds, including madecassoside, which serves as an antioxidant. Centella provides a wide variety of skin benefits such as anti-aging, moisturizing, and skin-soothing properties.     Colloidal Oat:  Colloidal Oatmeal is a classic ingredient that is commonly used as a soothing agent to relieve itchy skin and soothe irritation caused by dry skin conditions, but it also has a variety of functions. It strengthens the skin's barrier and prevents transepidermal water loss. Thus it soothes, protects, and moisturizes all at once. product_name: Keya Seth Aromatherapy Stopage V - The Age Reversal Complex Cream
ingredients: Key Ingredients:     Hyaluronic Acid:  Hyaluronic acid is considered the Holy grail of anti-aging treatments. This acid is naturally present in skin where it helps in preserving collagen, retaining skin moisture, skin elasticity and flexibility. The effects of ageing and harmful environmental agents deplete the amount of natural HA in skin, which works as the basic reason for formation of skin wrinkles, fine lines and loss of skin elasticity. The Hyaluronic acid present in STOPAGE V is quickly absorbed into the skin to replenish the lost HA thus repairing the signs of ageing, keeping it youthful for longer.     Essential Oils:     Lavender essential oil:  Known for its healing, antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects on skin.   Clary Sage essential oil:  Helps in balancing the level of skin moisture.   Frankincense essential oil:  Works as an instant nourisher for dry and mature skin. Heals scars and wrinkles.   Aloesin:  Aloesin is a natural glycoprotein derived from the Aloe Vera plant. This botanical extract promotes the natural regenerative ability of the skin and is used for treating uneven skin pigmentation. This glycoprotein also has skin soothing properties and offers protection from the harmful UV rays.     The Healing and Nourishing Vitamins      Vitamin C:  Evens out skin tone, improves skin hydration significantly and shields skin from environmental pollution.   Vitamin E:  Hydrates the skin and blocks free radicals thus reducing skin wrinkles and preventing further environmental damage to the skin.   Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin):  Riboflavin has a vital role to play in maintaining the collagen level in skin which is directly related to skin quality and elasticity.   Vitamin B3 (Niacinamide):  Helps in reducing wrinkles, hyper-pigmentation and uneven skin tone. Heals acne and damages caused by the UV rays.   Vitamin B5 (Pantothenic Acid):  Moisturizes, soothes, heals, regenerates, and protects skin from oxidative damage and UV rays.
